## Skill combinations

Use the smallest skill set that fits the task. Combine skills for leverage, not
ceremony, and adapt their principles instead of forcing every output format.

| Situation | Start with | Often combine with |
|---|---|---|
| Hidden data flow, contract, migration, security/privacy, or high regression risk | `.cps` | `.review` for risk audit, `.deep-perf` if speed/resource claims matter |
| Review request or approval decision | `.review` | `.cps` for cross-component risk; subagents for broad source review |
| Performance optimization | `.deep-perf` / `.dp` | subagents for bottleneck/test lenses, `.cps` for data path, `.chatgpt-pro` for external research packets |
| Broad exploration with several plausible solution paths | fork-clone subagents | fresh contrarian/reviewer; `.rws` for full-file drafts; `.review` before adoption |
| Messy component or architecture rewrite | `.rearchitect` / `.ra` | `.cps`, `.rewrite-subagents` / `.rws`, then `.review` before shipping |
| Full-file rewrite needs alternative designs | `.rewrite-subagents` / `.rws` | `.ra` for architecture direction, `.review` for blocker check |
| User idea is vague, broad, or product-shaped | `.deep-interview` | `.chatgpt-pro` if external/deep research would improve the spec |
| Browser/desktop/device behavior matters | `.computer-use` / `.cua` | `.review` for UX/regression audit; `.cps` for risky flows |
| Another workspace owns context or edits | `.cross-talk` / `.xt` | ordinary subagents for disposable local research; `.review` for cross-review |

Summ: Log xác nhận source build ra artifact có đủ `vi/media.html`, `en/media.html`, hình mới, video list; lỗi chỉ ở bước deploy bị hủy.
Next: Mình sẽ retry Pages build/deploy một lần nữa khi không còn run khác đang chạy, rồi kiểm tra link live.

arguments:
{"intent":"ensure no active runs, retry Pages build once, wait, and verify deploy","expect":"new run completes success and live media pages return 200","script":"set -e
printf '%s\n' '--- active runs before retry ---'
gh run list --repo abeefound-sketch/global_faith_temple --status in_progress --limit 10 || true
gh run list --repo abeefound-sketch/global_faith_temple --status queued --limit 10 || true
printf '%s\n' '\n--- trigger retry ---'
gh api -X POST repos/abeefound-sketch/global_faith_temple/pages/builds || true
printf '%s\n' '\n--- wait latest run ---'
sleep 5
run=$(gh run list --repo abeefound-sketch/global_faith_temple --workflow pages-build-deployment --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId')
echo "run=$run"
for i in $(seq 1 24); do
  data=$(gh run view "$run" --repo abeefound-sketch/global_faith_temple --json status,conclusion --jq '.status+" "+(.conclusion//"")')
  echo "check $i $data"
  case "$data" in completed*) break;; esac
  sleep 10
done
printf '%s\n' '\n--- final run ---'
gh run view "$run" --repo abeefound-sketch/global_faith_temple --json status,conclusion,jobs --jq '{status,conclusion,jobs:[.jobs[]|{name,conclusion}]}'
printf '%s\n' '\n--- live media check ---'
for u in https://abeefound-sketch.github.io/global_faith_temple/vi/media.html https://abeefound-sketch.github.io/global_faith_temple/en/media.html; do
  printf '\n%s\n' "$u"
  curl -L -s -o /tmp/body.$$ -D /tmp/headers.$$ -w 'http=%{http_code}\n' "$u"
  awk 'BEGIN{IGNORECASE=1}/^last-modified:|^etag:|^age:|^x-cache:/{print}' /tmp/headers.$$
  python3 - <<'PY' /tmp/body.$$
import sys,re
s=open(sys.argv[1],errors='ignore').read()
print('media=',('Media & Memories' in s or 'Âm Nhạc & Video' in s),'youtube=', 'LsJjCU2NbbI' in s)
print('title=', re.search(r'<title>(.*?)</title>',s,re.S).group(1).strip() if re.search(r'<title>(.*?)</title>',s,re.S) else 'none')
PY
done
rm -f /tmp/body.$$ /tmp/headers.$$","readonly":false,"workdir":"/mnt/d/5projects/globalfaith","timeout":360}
